ulasan.Ulasan: Namma ooru pillaiyaar! Feel like home
ulasan.teks_final: namma ooru pillaiyaar feel like home

ulasan.Ulasan: My life is turn out to good things by the blessings of Lord Karpaga Ganapathi... Jai Ganesha
ulasan.teks_final: my life is turn out to good things by the blessings of lord karpaga ganapathi jai ganesha

ulasan.Ulasan: There is a very beautiful temple and there is a lot of peace here.
ulasan.teks_final: there is very beautiful temple and there is lot of peace here

ulasan.Ulasan: Great vibes. The priest is very very welcoming and knowledgeable. These vibes certainly makes us go again and feel connected to temple vibes
ulasan.teks_final: great vibes the priest is very very welcoming and knowledgeable these vibes certainly makes us go again and feel connected to temple vibes

ulasan.Ulasan: A very blissful experience every time we visit this temple. Priest is very amicable and their poojas look very authentic. Very happy to have my favourite Ganesha temple in San Ramon neighbourhood 🙏🙏.
ulasan.teks_final: very blissful experience every time we visit this temple priest is very amicable and their poojas look very authentic very happy to have my favourite ganesha temple in san ramon neighbourhood

ulasan.Ulasan: Very cute temple with beautiful idols of Lord Ganesha. The priest is very welcoming and knowledgeable and makes you want to visit again and again. Temple also hosts several music events/sevas by local bay area music students and gurus.
ulasan.teks_final: very cute temple with beautiful idols of lord ganesha the priest is very welcoming and knowledgeable and makes you want to visit again and again temple also hosts several music events sevas by local bay area music students and gurus

ulasan.Ulasan: Always feel so blessed to be at this temple. The new temple is very beautiful, divine and is led by knowledgeable priest. Dedicated team of volunteers and a variety of programs to serve the community. 🙏🙏🙏
ulasan.teks_final: always feel so blessed to be at this temple the new temple is very beautiful divine and is led by knowledgeable priest dedicated team of volunteers and variety of programs to serve the community

ulasan.Ulasan: New Ganesh temple with very knowledgeable priests and dedicated volunteers. Visit and support this temple!!
ulasan.teks_final: new ganesh temple with very knowledgeable priests and dedicated volunteers visit and support this temple
